# Airco@Business

> Airco@Business is a B2B air-conditioning specialist based in Voorschoten (Zuid-Holland, Netherlands). We advise on, install, and maintain commercial air-conditioning systems for offices, commercial buildings, retail stores, and showrooms. Strictly business clients; residential customers are served by our consumer brand Airco@home (https://airco-athome.nl/).

Key facts:
- Service area: Zuid-Holland (Voorschoten, Leiden, Den Haag, Rotterdam, Hoofddorp, and surrounding cities); larger projects nationwide
- Installers: STEK-certified, working to the EU F-gas regulation
- Brands installed: Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, LG, Toshiba
- Systems: cassette (ceiling), ducted (concealed), and wall-mounted air conditioning — all heat-pump systems that cool and heat
- Contact: +31 (0)71 240 05 97 · info@aircoatbusiness.nl · response within one business day

## Services

- [Business air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/zakelijke-airconditioning/): overview of commercial solutions per property type
- [Office air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-kantoor/): stable working climate for offices
- [Commercial building air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-bedrijfspand/): multi-zone solutions for complete buildings
- [Retail air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-winkel/): store climate without visible technology
- [Showroom air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-showroom/): climate for large open presentation spaces
- [Commercial installation](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/zakelijke-airco-installatie/): capacity calculation, system advice, and installation
- [Cassette air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/cassette-airco-bedrijf/): ceiling-integrated, four-way air distribution
- [Ducted air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/kanaal-airco-bedrijf/): fully concealed, multiple zones
- [Wall-mounted air conditioning](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/wandmodel-airco-bedrijf/): compact solution for individual rooms
- [Maintenance](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-onderhoud-zakelijk/): preventive maintenance for commercial systems
- [Repairs](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-reparatie-zakelijk/): fault diagnosis and repair, all A-brands
- [Maintenance contracts](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/airco-onderhoudscontract-zakelijk/): fixed planning, priority service, predictable costs

## Company

- [Projects](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/projecten/): recent commercial installations
- [Our process](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/werkwijze/): consultation → site analysis → proposal → installation → aftercare
- [About](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/over-ons/): the business label of Airco@home B.V. (KvK 50312006)
- [FAQ](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/veelgestelde-vragen/): common questions on systems, installation, maintenance, and costs
- [Service area](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/werkgebied/): cities served in Zuid-Holland
- [Contact](https://aircoatbusiness.nl/contact/): quote requests and consultations

## Languages

Dutch (default, at the root) and English (under /en/, e.g. https://aircoatbusiness.nl/en/business-air-conditioning/).
